title: Pre-Imaging Liquid Growth Medium for Methionine promoted Labeling Systems - Yeast
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a94ep","text":"This protocol describes the steps to prepare liquid culture medium for Saccharomyces cerevisiae. This liquid medium is used to optimize yeast cultures for fluorescence imaging by the reduction of auto-fluorescence through an abundance of Adenine [1].","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1151f","text":"The surplus of Methionine in the medium represses the pp7-CP expression, which reduces the level of CP aggregates [2].","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Fill a 500 ml flask with 440 mL ddH 2 O. Add a magnetic stirring bar and place the flask on a stirring hot plate.
Add 3.36 g Yeast Nitrogen Base with Ammonium Sulfate without Amino Acids (YNB).

Add 0.86 g SC-XX powder. In regard to cover all optional dropout media the amino acid base holds the notification -xx, where xx stand for the amino acid(s) that is as selection factor, missing in the medium.
Add 5 mL Adenine 100x solution. The additional Adenine is supposed to repress the Adenine synthesize to reduce a possible accumulation of red pigment [1].
Add 5 mL Methionine 200x solution. The additional Methionine represses the Met promoter, which drives PP7 syntheses [2].
Autoclave for 00:15:00 at 121 °C . Remove the stirring bar before going to autoclave.
When the medium cooled down to around 80 °C add 50 mL sterile Glucose 20%.
The medium can be store at the bench for 2 to 3 months.
Fill a 500 ml flask with 315 mL ddH 2 O. Add a magnetic stirring bar and place the flask on a stirring hot plate.
Add 25 mL YNB 20x solution (Yeast Nitrogen Base with Ammonium Sulfate without Amino Acids).

Add 100 mL SC-XX 10x solution. In regard to cover all optional dropout media the amino acid base holds the notification -xx, where xx stand for the amino acid(s) that is as selection factor, missing in the medium.
Add 5 mL Adenine 100x solution. The additional Adenine is supposed to repress the Adenine synthesize to reduce a possible accumulation of red pigment [1].
Add 5 mL Methionine 200x solution. The additional Methionine represses the Met promoter, which drives PP7 syntheses [2].
Autoclave for 00:15:00 at 121 °C . Remove the stirring bar before going to autoclave.
When the medium cooled down to around 80 °C add 50 mL sterile Glucose 20%.
The medium can be store at the bench for 2 to 3 months.
creator: Mathias Hammer
